installation_requirements.work_area: Clear and unobstructed when lift is raised

specifications.lifting_mechanism: Four direct drive hydraulic cylinders using no cables, chains or mechanical lifting screws
specifications.synchronization_side_to_side: Hydraulic fluid displacement backed by twin opposing non-load bearing leaf chains
specifications.synchronization_fore_and_aft: Automatically controlled with electrical fluid track leveling system and hydraulic gear-type flow divider with solenoid controlled valving
specifications.backup_hydraulic_safety_systems: Pressure compensated flow controls and velocity fuses and manual pump and valving to allow lowering in a no power situation
specifications.electrical_safety_systems: Cross-wired electronic system with out of level shut-off safety backup

features: 110,000 or 120,000 lb capacity four-post track lift
Four direct drive hydraulic cylinders - no cables, chains, or mechanical lifting screws
30-foot standard track length with custom lengths available
Hydraulic fluid displacement synchronization (side to side) backed by twin opposing leaf chains
Automatic electrical fluid track leveling system with hydraulic gear-type flow divider (fore and aft)
Single point air release mechanical safety
Multi-position mechanical safety locks every 6 inches
Pressure compensated flow controls and velocity fuses
Manual pump for lowering in no-power situation
Track adjustment from 3 ft 6 in inside to 9 ft 6 in outside
Custom widths and track lengths available
certifications: Available under discounted government contract in all 50 states
safety_features: Single point air release mechanical safety
Multi-position mechanical safety locks every 6 inches
Manual pump and valving for no-power lowering
Cross-wired electronic system with out-of-level shut-off safety backup
notes: TR-110 with 30-foot tracks shown; other lengths, widths, and capacities available
Control console position to be determined by customer
Specifications subject to change without notice
Manufacturer: Mohawk Lifts, LLC., P.O. Box 110, 65 Vrooman Ave, Amsterdam, NY 12010
